name: Strategic Planning
description: Develops comprehensive long-term strategies for brands and businesses — connecting brand positioning, market dynamics, audience insights, and business objectives into coherent plans that guide all marketing and creative decisions.

variables.name: business_objective
variables.description: The overarching business objective the strategy must support

variables.name: market_context
variables.description: Current market conditions, category trends, and market dynamics

variables.name: competitive_landscape
variables.description: Key competitors, their positioning, and market shares
